title: SASC Advances 766 Military Nominations, ...
description: On Wednesday, December 14, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to favorably report out a list of 766 military nominations in...
text:
On Wednesday, December 14, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to favorably report out a list of 766 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, and Space Force. The nominations were immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
On Thursday, December 15, the full Senate voted 76-20 to confirm the nomination of Tia Johnson be a Judge of the United States Court of Appeals for the Armed Forces.
